title: The Packet Detective 🕵️
description: Match the service to its standard port and protocol.
problemStatement:
You are monitoring network traffic and see several packets. Match the **Service** to the correct **Port** and **Protocol (TCP/UDP)**.

**Service list**:
1. A secure remote terminal session (SSH).
2. A web browser loading a secure page (HTTPS).
3. A live video conference call.
4. Viewing a non-secure old company blog (HTTP).

**Your Mission**: Provide the standard port numbers for each in order.
hints: Real-time video prefers speed (UDP) but often starts with control over TCP.
